items.title_zh: 趋境ATaaS平台发布，打造日均万亿产能的"Token工厂"
items.summary_zh: 量子位：趋境科技正式发布ATaaS（AI Token即服务）平台，定位为全球领先的高效能AI Token生产服务平台，日均算力产能可达万亿Token级别。该平台旨在为企业提供稳定、低成本的大模型推理算力服务，助力AI应用规模化落地。

items.title_zh: 华为盘古大模型负责人王云鹤离职，被曝Agent创业
items.summary_zh: 量子位：华为诺亚方舟实验室主任、盘古大模型负责人王云鹤正式离职，并被曝出正在进行AI Agent方向的创业。王云鹤2018年博士毕业后加入华为，2025年接棒担任实验室主任，其离职引发业界对国内AI人才流动的广泛关注。

items.title_en: Anthropic's 'Claude Mythos' leak reveals powerful new AI model raising cybersecurity concerns
items.title_zh: Anthropic「Claude Mythos」泄露：新模型引发网络安全警报
items.summary_en: Hacker News / CoinDesk: An internal leak revealed Anthropic is testing a new model codenamed "Claude Mythos," described as highly capable in ways that spooked cybersecurity investors. Stocks in cybersecurity firms fell sharply on fears the model could automate offensive capabilities previously requiring expert knowledge.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News / CoinDesk：内部泄露显示Anthropic正在测试代号「Claude Mythos」的新模型，其强大能力引发网络安全领域担忧，相关上市公司股价大幅下跌，市场担忧该模型可能使高级网络攻击能力大众化。

items.title_zh: 趋境科技发布ATaaS：全球领先的高效能AI Token生产服务平台
items.summary_zh: 量子位：趋境科技发布ATaaS（AI Token as a Service）平台，主打高效能AI Token生产服务，致力于解决传统硬件高投入却难以实现高效Token产出的痛点，面向企业提供弹性AI算力服务。

items.title_en: AI bug reports went from junk to legit overnight, says Linux kernel maintainer
items.title_zh: Linux内核维护者：AI提交的漏洞报告质量突飞猛进
items.summary_en: Hacker News / The Register: Linux kernel maintainer Greg Kroah-Hartman noted that AI-generated bug reports have dramatically improved in quality, going from nearly useless to genuinely actionable. The shift signals growing maturity of AI-assisted security research in open source.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News / The Register：Linux内核维护者Greg Kroah-Hartman指出，AI生成的漏洞报告质量急剧提升，从几乎无用变为真正可操作，标志着AI辅助安全研究在开源领域日趋成熟。

items.title_en: The latest in data centers, AI, and energy
items.title_zh: 数据中心、AI与能源领域最新动态
items.summary_en: The Verge: Senators Warren and Hawley pressed the EIA to mandate annual energy-use disclosures from data centers, while the EIA launched a voluntary pilot in four U.S. regions. Major tech firms had previously signed Trump's Ratepayer Protection Pledge to self-fund AI data center power.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：参议员沃伦与霍利联名致信能源信息署要求强制数据中心披露能耗数据，EIA同步启动四地区自愿试点；此前谷歌、Meta等已签署特朗普电费保护承诺，承诺自建AI数据中心供电设施。

items.title_zh: 钉钉CLI开源！首批开放10项核心产品能力，原生支持Claude Code等
items.summary_zh: 量子位：钉钉 CLI 开源项目正式上架 GitHub，采用 Apache-2.0 协议，首批开放 AI 表格、日历、机器人等 10 项核心产品能力，原生支持 Claude Code、Cursor 等主流 AI 编程与 Agent 执行环境。这是国内首个面向 AI Agent 开源全产品能力的国民级应用，开发者一行指令即可调用企业级功能。

items.title_en: Judge sides with Anthropic to temporarily block the Pentagon's ban
items.title_zh: 法院支持Anthropic，暂时阻止五角大楼禁令
items.summary_en: The Verge: A federal judge granted Anthropic a temporary injunction blocking the Pentagon's supply-chain-based ban on its AI products. The ruling marks a significant early legal win for Anthropic against the Defense Department's exclusion order, with the case set to continue.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：联邦法官裁定支持Anthropic申请，暂时阻止五角大楼以供应链安全为由对Anthropic产品实施的禁令，这是Anthropic对抗国防部排除令的重要法律胜利，案件将继续审理。

items.title_en: David Sacks is no longer the White House AI and Crypto Czar
items.title_zh: 戴维·萨克斯卸任白宫AI与加密货币专员
items.summary_en: The Verge: David Sacks has stepped down as the White House AI and Crypto Czar, transitioning to a special tech advisory council to make recommendations to the Trump administration. His departure marks a shift in the executive office's AI policy leadership.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：戴维·萨克斯辞去白宫AI与加密货币专员职务，转入特别科技顾问委员会向特朗普政府提供建议，其离任标志着白宫AI政策领导层的重要变动。

items.title_en: Google is making it easier to import another AI's memory into Gemini
items.title_zh: 谷歌新增功能：可将其他AI记忆导入Gemini
items.summary_en: The Verge: Google is introducing a feature that lets users import chat history and memory from competing AI assistants directly into Gemini. The capability lowers switching costs for users moving from ChatGPT or other services, as Gemini can then use that context going forward.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：谷歌为Gemini新增从ChatGPT等竞品AI助手导入聊天记录和记忆的功能，大幅降低用户迁移成本，Gemini可直接利用导入的上下文提供连续性服务。

items.title_en: Apple will reportedly allow other AI chatbots to plug into Siri
items.title_zh: 据报道苹果将允许第三方AI聊天机器人接入Siri
items.summary_en: The Verge: Apple is reportedly planning to let third-party AI chatbots—including Google Gemini and Anthropic's Claude—integrate with Siri in iOS 27. The move would open Apple's voice assistant platform to external AI models, extending beyond the existing ChatGPT partnership.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：据报道苹果计划在iOS 27中允许Gemini、Claude等第三方AI聊天机器人接入Siri，将语音助手平台开放给外部AI模型，超越现有ChatGPT独家合作范围。

items.title_en: Apple's AI Playlist Playground is bad at music
items.title_zh: 苹果AI Playlist Playground音乐生成效果差
items.summary_en: The Verge: Apple's Playlist Playground beta, which creates Apple Music playlists from AI text prompts, fails to understand genre, era, or mood in any reliable way. The tool represents a weak first-gen AI music curation product from Apple.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：苹果Playlist Playground测试版可通过AI文本提示生成Apple Music播放列表，但在理解流派、年代和情绪方面表现糟糕，被认为是苹果AI音乐策展的薄弱初代产品。

items.title_en: Google's 'live' AI search assistant can handle conversations in dozens more languages
items.title_zh: 谷歌实时AI搜索助手新增支持数十种语言
items.summary_en: The Verge: Google is expanding its AI-powered live search assistant to dozens of additional languages globally, broadening real-time conversational search access. The update also brings Google Translate's real-time translation tool to iOS.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：谷歌将AI实时搜索助手扩展至数十种新语言，在全球范围内普及实时对话式搜索，同时将Google翻译的实时翻译功能引入iOS平台。

items.title_en: Meta gets ready to launch two new Ray-Ban AI glasses
items.title_zh: Meta准备推出两款新Ray-Ban AI眼镜
items.summary_en: The Verge: Two new Meta Ray-Ban smart glasses models codenamed 'Scriber' and 'Blazer' have passed through the FCC, signaling an imminent launch. The new models are expected to expand on the AI assistant capabilities of the current Ray-Ban Meta lineup.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：代号「Scriber」和「Blazer」的两款Meta Ray-Ban新款智能眼镜已通过FCC认证，预示即将发布。新机型预计将在现有Ray-Ban Meta基础上进一步强化AI助手功能。

items.title_zh: 维基百科禁止AI生成文章
items.summary_en: The Verge: Wikipedia has formally banned the use of AI for generating or rewriting articles, citing that LLM-produced content "often violates several of Wikipedia's core content policies" including accuracy, neutrality, and verifiability standards.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：维基百科正式禁止使用AI生成或改写文章，理由是大语言模型产出的内容「往往违反维基百科多项核心内容政策」，包括准确性、中立性和可查证性标准。

items.title_en: Senators are pushing to find out how much electricity data centers actually use
items.title_zh: 美国参议员敦促披露数据中心实际用电量
items.summary_en: The Verge: Senators Warren and Hawley sent a bipartisan letter demanding the Energy Information Administration require mandatory annual electricity-use disclosures from data centers, as AI-driven expansion raises grid and ratepayer concerns.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：沃伦与霍利两党参议员联名致信能源信息署，要求强制数据中心每年披露用电量，原因是AI驱动的数据中心扩张对电网和电费带来持续压力。

items.title_en: Mistral releases a new open-source model for speech generation
items.title_zh: Mistral发布开源语音生成模型，可在智能手表上运行
items.summary_en: Mistral: Released a lightweight open-source text-to-speech model designed to run on smartphones and smartwatches, continuing the company push toward highly compact on-device AI models.
items.summary_zh: Mistral：发布轻量级开源文字转语音模型，可在智能手机和智能手表上运行，延续公司打造极致轻量端侧AI的战略布局。

items.title_en: Cohere launches an open-source voice model specifically for transcription
items.title_zh: Cohere发布专为语音转写设计的开源语音模型
items.summary_en: Cohere: Released a 2-billion-parameter open-source speech transcription model optimized for consumer-grade GPUs and self-hosting, supporting 14 languages and targeting enterprise deployments needing local inference.
items.summary_zh: Cohere：发布20亿参数开源语音转写模型，专为消费级GPU和私有化部署优化，支持14种语言，面向需本地推理的企业用户。

items.title_zh: 维基百科禁止AI生成内容
items.summary_en: Wikipedia: The platform is banning the use of AI for generating or rewriting articles, stating that LLM-generated content often violates core content policies around sourcing, neutrality, and verifiability.
items.summary_zh: 维基百科：平台宣布禁止使用AI生成或改写文章，称LLM产生的内容常违反来源、中立性和可核实性等核心内容政策。

items.title_en: A pound of flesh from data centers: one senator's answer to AI job losses
items.title_zh: 向数据中心征税：参议员提出AI失业补偿方案
items.summary_en: Sen. Mark Warner: Proposed taxing data centers to fund worker transition programs as fears of AI-driven job displacement intensify, framing it as making the AI industry pay for the economic disruption it causes.
items.summary_zh: 美国参议员马克·华纳：提议对数据中心征税，用于资助受AI冲击工人的转型项目，要求AI行业为其引发的经济冲击承担责任。
